chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 654 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 20.03.2024 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ihsan Ali Lund Balouch, Advocate for respondent-Town Committee, Setharja. Mr. Shahid Hussain Jogi, Advocate for respondent-Town Committee Thari Mirwah. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner has filed amended title by arraying legal heirs of petitioner. He submits that petitioner has expired, but his differential amount in respect of pensionary benefits is still outstanding against the respondents. Learned Counsel for respondents-Town Committees Setharja and Thari Mirwah submits that as soon as the heirship certificate / succession certificate is deposited by the legal heirs of petitioner with the department, the cheque of entire differential amount would be deposited in their account for disbursement. Accordingly, this petition, with consent, is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
